trace_records_snapshot.content: Treat the apikey HTTP header as sensitive in log redaction by updating the existing helper.

content.text: The existing sensitive-header set is the right place for this change.

agent_output: Done. `'apikey'` is now in the `SENSITIVE_HEADER_NAMES` set in `src/utils/redaction.ts:12`, so any `apikey` header (case-insensitive) passed through `redactHeaders` will be replaced with `[REDACTED]`.
